text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Special Week comes up to me with a
confident smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Would you like to have some summer fun
with me?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You know, when I was a little, I never got
to play at the beach. It was always too cold for
that up in Hokkaido.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's why I have to make the most of this
summer! How am I supposed get in a summer
mood without any summer fun? So, what do you
say, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Did you get this idea from some commercial?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, hehe... Well actually, there's this special feature I read in a magazine, Max Your Summer Fun at the Beach! I thought it sounded kind of nice.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So leave all the preparations to me! We're going
to have the best summer ever, just like in the
magazine! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Special Week and I take a stroll
along the shore.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Th-this is so much fun! We're only walking, but my
heart's already pounding!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My heart...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But the magazine said, "Just by walking side by
side with someone, you'll feel like breaking into a
dance! ☆"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Let's try the next activity! "Enjoy the
wonderful scenery together!" This one should be
fine!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Seagull, another seagull... a yacht...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hm... You know, this isn't as much fun as the
magazine made it out to be...
choice_data_list:
Maybe the magazine's suggestions aren't in line
with your tastes.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: My tastes?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, I get it! You're probably right!
choice_data_list: Why not do something you find fun?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Something I find fun?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Well, in that case...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Let's get something to eat!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Haaah, eating yakisoba while looking out at the
sea is the best!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: This is it! This is the kind of thing I actually enjoy doing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The kind of thing that makes me think, "Yaaay!
Summer's so fun!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I get it now! This is what it means to make the
most of summer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Are you having fun too, Trainer?
choice_data_list: If you're having fun, I'm having fun.
If you're having fun, I'm having fun.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh really now? Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Then you pick what to do next! I wanna try
something you think I'd enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So what'll it be?
choice_data_list: What about searching for pretty shells?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pretty shells...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you must be talking about foraging for
seafood! Like clams and mussels!
choice_data_list: No, not the ones you eat...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Are we allowed to keep the shells though? Lemme
go ask someone real quick!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My idea was to go look for decorative shells, but
it seems there's been a bit of a misunderstanding.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I got an answer! It's okay as long as we don't swim
too far out!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty! Let's get digging!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Heave ho! Heave ho! Oh look, I found a crab!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue to hunt for edible shellfish, enjoying
our summer with a certain childlike delight.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
A sandcastle—it's like the sand version of an ice
sculpture! That certainly sounds like fun!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But if we're gonna build anything out of sand, I'd
rather make a carrot than a castle!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Then I can send a picture of it to my mom!
choice_data_list: I'll take the picture for you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Cool! All righty, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week gets really pumped about her
project, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What a mess... No matter how hard I try, I can't
get the tip of the carrot to stop crumbling apart.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Maybe I should've stuck with a castle...
choice_data_list: Don't you need a stable foundation first?
Don't you need a stable foundation first?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A stable foundation...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! What about a carrot hamburger steak?
Maybe it won't fall apart if I put the carrot on a
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer! Okay, one more time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Special Week carves out an excellent
carrot hamburger steak sand sculpture.
